readings.Aries: Everyone in the room can feel you deciding. Make the decision. The resistance you feel is pointing at something worth examining.
readings.Taurus: There's something quietly growing in a direction you haven't examined lately. Look now. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Gemini: Someone is taking your adaptability for granted. You have noticed. It's worth mentioning. The window for this is shorter than it looks.
readings.Cancer: Your memory holds things gently that others would have dropped. Today that gift is needed. You already have what you need to take the next step.
readings.Leo: The audience changes who you are. Spend some time today with no audience. The energy available today is better used gently.
readings.Virgo: There is a relationship you've been analysing instead of experiencing. Enter it. You already have what you need to take the next step.
readings.Libra: Your need for balance is not weakness — it's an accurate reading of what makes systems work. The resistance you feel is pointing at something worth examining.
readings.Scorpio: What's beneath the anger is more interesting than the anger. Go there. This situation responds well to direct engagement.
readings.Sagittarius: Your optimism sometimes arrives before the data. Today the data is there. Let it inform the optimism. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Capricorn: There's a version of rest you can access without losing anything. Find it. The question matters more than the answer right now.
readings.Aquarius: The relationship that doesn't fit your system is the one that's teaching you something important. Trust the slow version of this over the fast one.
readings.Pisces: Someone's pain has become your pain. This is your nature. Also: you are allowed to put it down. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You're both good at starting things. One of you will have to become better at finishing them.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You're both good at starting things. One of you will have to become better at finishing them.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
